nasb.text: But King Hezekiah and Isaiah the prophet, the son of Amoz, prayed about this and cried out to heaven.

esv.text: Then Hezekiah the king and Isaiah the prophet, the son of Amoz, prayed because of this and cried to heaven.

cnv.text: 希西家王和亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞先知為了這事禱告，向天呼求。

ccb.text: 于是，希西迦王和亚摩斯的儿子以赛亚先知向天上的上帝呼求祷告。
